title: erigeron gilliesii
intro: Erigeron gilliesii, also known as the small fleabane, is a perennial herb belonging to the daisy family (Asteraceae). This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems. The health benefits of Erigeron gilliesii include its ability to reduce inflammation, fight off infections, and support the immune system. It can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to promote overall well-being and alleviate symptoms of various health conditions.
